projectDescription: NetInterface - A platform-independent network abstraction library for Arduino-compatible boards
guidelines: Prefer smart pointers (std::unique_ptr, std::shared_ptr) for memory management
Use virtual destructors in base classes
Use override keyword for virtual function overrides
Avoid raw pointers except for non-owning references
Use scoped enums (enum class) instead of plain enums
Follow Arduino library conventions for public API
architectureGuidelines: Use template implementations for platform-specific wrappers
Maintain consistent error handling across all platforms
Ensure all public methods are documented with Doxygen comments
Use SFINAE for template constraints where needed
